CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL( Homes_suitable_for_KPI1_RAG__c, "Green"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Homes_suitable_for_KPI2_RAG__c, "Green"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( PR_matches_previous_baseline_RAG__c, "Green"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Carry_over_any_deviation_RAG__c, "Green"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Accompanying_PCR_RAG__c, "Green"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Compliant_wave_3_RAG__c, "Green"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Key_project_roles_RAG__c, "Green"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Comply_with_A_A_policy_RAG__c, "Green"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Received_signed_copy_RAG__c, "Green"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Updated_PP_RR_RAG__c, "Green"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Phase_DCA_RAG__c, "Green"), 1, 0)
CustomField.label: Declarations - Total Green
